Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Abidan]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 6''' — Cradle is the birthplace of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — The Abidan were created to save the weak who stand against the strong.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — The Abidan collect and quarantine important worlds as a last bastion against infinite chaos.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Abidan wear smooth, absolutely white armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Abidan use technology that can create stable domes unaffected by chaos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Abidan evacuated the elite of Harrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — The Abidan have a headquarters in Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The survival of the Abidan depends on Ozriel's presence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Abidan's forces were once only able to care for two hundred and fifty Iterations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Abidan protect Iterations from chaos-tainted fragments at the edges of the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — Abidan are allowed a certain degree of autonomy when responding to spatial or temporal violations.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — The majority of the inhabitants of Oversight are not Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Other divisions of the Abidan are headquartered on Sanctum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Abidan is a group that can change the destiny of an Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 18''' — The Abidan is an organization composed of white-armored figures arranged in seven distinct ranks.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 1''' — Abidans are beings that can be rendered powerless without the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Abidan are under attack across their border worlds.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Iri robbed the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Mad King hates the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 21''' — The Abidan are the creators of Cradle.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Abidan are mentioned as entities that Northstrider may have promised service to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Abidan have placed restrictions on the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — Northstrider advised not to rely on the intervention of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 2''' — The Abidan act only for their own benefit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — The Abidan wear smooth, almost liquid armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The Abidan took out the arrowhead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 4''' — The Ninecloud Court cannot provoke the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Abidan are descending.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 14''' — Abidan intervention is suspected in how sacred artists understood complex principles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Some low-ranking Abidan view those in Cradle as misguided infants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Abidan are present at the contest.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 1''' — The Abidan attack using blue lances of Way-power to reinforce their attacks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Abidan figures flank the portal to Threshold and wear seamless eggshell-white armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Abidan banners depict a stylized fox wrapped in its own tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Abidan have eyes upon those entering the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — The Abidan have a system.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Abidan are organized into white-armored legions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Abidan possess abilities that exceed those of the Monarchs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Abidan guardians fight the champions of the Vroshir blade-to-blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — The first generation of Abidan rose from Cradle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Abidan is a group that was once ten thousand worlds strong before Ozriel's departure.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — The Abidan described Penance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Abidan controls territory across existence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Abidan receive messages sent through the Way Between Worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Abidan are currently stretched to their absolute limits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Abidan control ten sectors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Abidan abandoned nine hundred and ninety sectors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — Abidan agents deliver reports to the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — There are seven greatest assets among the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 3''' — The Judges are described as unusually individualistic and forceful.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The Abidan includes the Phoenix Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — The Abidan can colonize nine worlds after Ozriel reaps one.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Some believe Ozriel to be the most valuable of the Judges.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Haven is the prison-world of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — The Abidan gifted Penance to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 22''' — The Abidan possess an unstoppable sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Reigan Shen questioned if the Abidan were coming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — The Abidan is a group that includes Eithan's peers who might imprison him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Malice wondered if the Abidan were unable to wipe memories.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — The Mad King's imitation Scythe was of Abidan make.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — The manacles act as a beacon to any Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 4''' — Northstrider refuses to bow to the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon suspected an Abidan would be needed to find them in their current location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Abidan prioritizes stabilizing worlds over eliminating the enemy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Eithan Arelius is an Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — The Abidan control once fell apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Abidan have an oath of noninterference.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — The Vroshir oppose the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — The Abidan have former systems they may regain control over.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — The Abidan hate the Monarchs and consider them parasites.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 5''' — The Titans are an order of Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — The target has a barrier from the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Makiel has ruled over the greatest losses since the founding of the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Abidan have fallen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Abidan offered Penance as a prize for the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — The Abidan are the only people who have forcibly summoned Northstrider since his advancement to Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 24''' — The Abidan are responsible for the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — The Abidan were guarding the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — The Abidan have a way to monitor worlds below them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Lower-ranking Abidan handle business that is not important enough for a Judge's individual attention.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth feels the sword of the Abidan hanging over his head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The Mad King believes the Abidan are going to fall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — The Abidan raised a guardian to protect the place in case Markuth or someone like him returned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Li Markuth has information the Abidan would want.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Eithan may have been imprisoned by the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — The Abidan have been enslaving people from Lindon's world for thousands of years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — The Abidan gave Lindon Suriel's marble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Most Abidan are not Wolves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — The Abidan assured Lindon that almost two years had passed in their location.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 2''' — The Abidan organization had not seen talent like Eithan and Ozmanthus since the first generation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The Abidan are a far-reaching human organization that can manipulate the Way directly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — All Abidan divisions are headquartered within great golden pyramids.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The lowest ranks of the Abidan struggle to maintain their connection to the Way or direct it at scale.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The Abidan was the last out of the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — The Abidan describe the Way flowing through a person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Hall is a young Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Abidan is composed of various Divisions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Abidan are a group that protects worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Many workers on Pioneer 602 see the Abidan as divine beings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Abidan are shorthanded.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Abidan supervise worlds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Class Three Fiends are opponents for entire groups of Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Abidan can wear black armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Abidan use arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — An Abidan cannot kill a Fiend in the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan are powerless to intervene in certain situations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan have occupied Threshold since the first generation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — An Abidan woman with a curled-up fox symbol on her armor assisted in Lindon's transport.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan are permitted to use their full power in Threshold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Three Abidan are watching the battle from behind a formation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan consider the Reapers to be traitors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan have special authority over the Way and can lock down a world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan are in the Way and their will is inviolable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan are official and predictable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Abidan is an organization.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — Most Abidan wear gray outfits under their armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Abidan is a group that Ozriel believes has no hope left without support.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — The Abidan were involved in the creation of OTEP.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Abidan issued warnings to Lindon and Yerin upon their emergence from a Way-portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Abidan dangles an arrowhead.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
